model_input:
You are a UI clicking agent. Given a screenshot of a screen, determine the pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at(x, y, confidence) with the center pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at().

Actually, looking at the prompt again, it seems it's a template. I need to find the target element. Let's re-read. "Given a screenshot of a screen, determine the pixel coordinates of the target element."
